We apologize that we don't have a fit but it is a fantastic song nonetheless! We wish you all the best and hope the campaign goes well! Hello, thank you for sending your track to me. The vocal performance of the song was smooth. It has a very uplifting and lighthearted atmosphere, which I enjoyed. However, I do need to admit that the instrumentation of the track was a little bit too mellow for me in certain moments, which has led me to decide that I'm gonna give it a miss. At the moment, I'm on the lookout for tracks adjacent to the ones with those from MGMT and modest mouse

Hi!

Thank you for sharing your song with me, I really appreciate it. 🙏

The rhythm was honestly really nice.

It had a smooth indie groove that carried the song well.

What I wasn’t completely convinced by was the mood of the vocal melody. I personally miss a bit of happier mood there.

I usually look for indie pop tracks that feel more cheerful and light in energy.

But that’s purely a playlist taste thing on my side.

Your music clearly has personality and intention behind it.

Wishing you lots of success with your future releases! 👋

Awesome work here, that instrumentation sounds so captivating, and it gives me this nostalgia kind of vibe as the track is so classic coded! Your vocal quality really matches this kind of genre, expressions, and tonality are both precise! However, I go for a modern kind of sound for my indie playlist.

Catchy riffs paired with powerful vocals make for a brilliant sound on this, your lead vocals remind me of pearl jam! Love the switch up in energy at 0:48 too. This just leaned a little more into a mainstream sound in my opinion which isn't totally aligned with the tracks I typically select for the playlist. Keep in mind this is just one opinion and not a direct reflection of your art - stay creating!

despite having so much going on on here the song remains super cohesive, vocals come through the music so very cleanly and seamlessly. this is totally based off of the aesthetics of my curation but the mix is leaning a tad bit too heavily on the raw end for it to be a perfect fit, i'm sorry, regardless it's a super clever track

Hi Socially Acceptable, thank you for your submission. Great job on this tune. Really enjoying the instrumentation especially. The electric guitar tone. The drums. The overall performances were all very nice. The only negative for me is the vocals and chorus just didn't especially stand out for me among the stiff competition. I think some modern mixing style on the vocals could perhaps improve the track for me personally. But due to those reasons,  I'll be passing on this one this time around. Apologies - Austin

SH2BA comes out the gates hot and never really looks back. Huge driven guitar waves. Lots of forward momentum to the track. Rolling textured keys. Really strong lead vocals that sit on top the mix with passion and power. Solid bass low end. Very proggy arrangement. Lyrics feel like a stream of personal consciousness. Huge driven guitar waves. Its almost dynamic at its own expense, never allowing the listener to fully sink into the listen. Of course that's a matter of subjective tastes. I appreciate the listen here but i couldn't totally get into it.

Hey thanks for submitting this track. We enjoy the drive and energy that you have captured here. Especially the drums and the voice carry the track well together. That being said personally we are looking for a somewhat more intimate and moodier sound. So, sadly we have to pass this time. Much success with this song anyway!

Thanks for sharing your song SH2BA.  It had a smooth, classic indie feel to it.  Unfortunately I felt the style was a little too indie style for our hard rock and modern rock playlists - we look for more mainstream rock energy in the songs we put on the playlists - going to pass on this one, but feel free to send me others if you think they may fit.

Thanks for another submission!  Really enjoyed this song again, I thought your writing was really strong and all of the performances and production sounded great.  Really dont have any constructive criticisms and I think the right audience is going to enjoy this song but I am declining because its a bit more pop rock leaning than I am looking to add
Hi, I like the instrumental with upbeat melodies but unfortunately for my playlists I am looking for more moody songs rather than energetic ones. Sorry and good luck with promoting

Hi there

Thank you for your submission. Excellent smooth bassline groove here alongside the bright jangly guitar tones. I was a particular fan of the crisp snap on the percussion as well. However for our indie rock playlist we are looking for songs that have a more raucous energetic high tempo sound closer to the early releases of Arctic Monkeys and their song 'From The Ritz To The Rubble'. A very enjoyable listen though.

Best of luck with your continued promotional efforts for the release.

Kind Regards
Andrew
